programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones and the Phantom Train of Doom
programme.desc: Indy and his friend Remy infiltrate German lines in 1916 Africa to knock a dangerous cannon out of commission

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Teknobot

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A man seeks to increase his intelligence and become a world-renowned scientist but his quest results in the deaths of other researchers

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is using parrots to learn secret formulas and then KAOS smuggles them out of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 218
programme.desc: Hercules 218

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Research continues on the scarecrow probe Boone starts learning Taelon to interpret its messages The device meanwhile absorbs a scientist Rayna

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Wanting to set off a tribal war within the human race the aliens attempt to detonate a nuclear bomb at a US-Soviet disarmament summit

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Sheriff Andrews allows Dr Arcane to hunt an employee for sport To teach Andrews a lesson Alec traps him a fantasy of the old west populated by familiar faces forcing him to duel the evil Renegade Jake in a fight to the death

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: What happens when the swamp itself is no longer an ally to Swamp Thing The answers lay with a man called Mephisto

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Young 217
programme.desc: Young 217

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: James Woods plays the perfect homely US Navy sailor in dress blues with a bad temper along with his Navy buddies they are looking for a jeweler that closed his store a few days before they hit town Their course leads to murder anchors aweigh

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble breaks jail with a friendly simple-minded young man and finds out the man may have been falsely blamed for a crime he did not commit years ago

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A new couples soon-to-be opened general store is invaded by criminals to be used for a tunnel to rob the Barkleys of their gold and the couples husband is apparently involved

programme.title: Avenging Force
programme.desc: A senator is targeted by the Pentangle a right wing paramilitary group His pal a former CIA agent and martial artist tries to help him The group kidnaps the agents sister and tries to hunt him down The Most Dangerous Game style

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with more action packed MMA! We kick off this show with a great amateur fight between Dale Tallman and Chris Smeltzer. Following is the Main event of the evening, a professional Light Heavyweight Title Fight between UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace and TUF finalist Dan Spohn. You are in for five rounds of MMA action, so do not miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: An unconquered planet in the midst of Monster Minds intrigues the Lightning League and they go to investigate Upon crash landing they discover the energy of the Pride and the vehicles and their own energy is being drained

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Premonition of Love and Death

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Miyukis Decision

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter trades in his holographic powers for a powerful new blaster and learns that power isnt all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegade wreak havoc on Earth while disguised as Guardians and the terrified humans ask Leader-1 to take his people off Earth
